basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Library Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Library Attendant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 2 Library Attendant posts. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Library Attendant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Pass in Plus Two or Equivalent, Two years of office experience (post qualification), Conversant with English and Hindi, Basic knowledge of computer & MS Office (Desirable)
qualification.details: Library Attendant: Pass in Plus Two or Equivalent & Two years of office experience (post qualification). Conversant with English and Hindi. Desirable: Basic knowledge of computer & MS Office.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Library Attendant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Library Attendant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Library Attendant position at IIM Kozhikode is 14th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Library Attendant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Library Attendant position at the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Attendant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Plus Two or an equivalent examination and possess two years of post-qualification office experience. Basic computer knowledge is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Attendant position is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Library Attendant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Library Attendant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications for the Library Attendant position at IIM Kozhikode must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673570.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for this Library Attendant position is contractual.
